prompt:
We pull finished runs off the film-scanning bench with collect_run.zsh (zsh 5.9 on the bench box). It has stopped collecting entirely -- even into a brand-new empty run folder it bails out immediately:

    $ zsh collect_run.zsh bench run014
    collect_run.zsh:35: no matches found: run014/part_?.lst

There are no part files in run014. There is nothing in run014 at all -- that is the entire point of a fresh run folder. Meanwhile three finished frames are sitting in bench/color and bench/mono waiting to be filed, and my colleague swears the script logic is exactly what we all reviewed.

Get it working end to end under zsh: a fresh run collects the plain frame files out of both trays (and only those -- the rejects subfolder and the bench notes must stay behind), a second attempt on the same folder refuses, real part_N.lst leftovers still refuse, and an empty bench says nothing to collect. zsh test_scanrun.zsh checks all of that, including that zsh -n is clean; don't touch the test file.
